input:
. patient=Im  age=78  nursing_home_resident
. vitals  temp=38.9  hr=112  rr=22  bp=94/60  spo2=94pct
. mental_status=confused  baseline=alert
. labs  WBC=18400  lactate=3.2  creatinine=1.8_baseline_0.9
. history  UTI_3days_ago  started_abx_oral
question: Sepsis 여부 판단과 즉각 처치 계획을 WCY 추론으로.
wcy_reasoning:
~ task  sepsis_evaluation  domain=emergency_medicine
. patient=Im  age=78  nursing_home_resident
. vitals  temp=38.9  hr=112  rr=22  bp=94/60  spo2=94pct
. mental_status=confused  baseline=alert
. labs  WBC=18400  lactate=3.2  creatinine=1.8_baseline_0.9
. history  UTI_3days_ago  started_abx_oral
: fever_present  temp=38.9_exceeds_38  conf=1.0  from=2
: tachycardia_present  hr=112_exceeds_90  conf=1.0  from=2
: tachypnea_present  rr=22_exceeds_20  conf=1.0  from=2
: hypotension_present  systolic=94_below_100  conf=0.9  from=2
: altered_mental_status  confusion_vs_baseline_alert  conf=1.0  from=3
: leukocytosis_present  WBC=18400_exceeds_12000  conf=1.0  from=4
: elevated_lactate  lactate=3.2_exceeds_2.0  conf=1.0  from=4
: acute_kidney_injury  creatinine_doubled_from_baseline  conf=0.95  from=4
: infection_source_likely_urinary  from=5,11  conf=0.85
: SIRS_criteria_met  fever_tachy_tachy_leuko  count=4/4  from=6,7,8,11  conf=1.0
: qSOFA_score=2  hypotension_altered_mental  from=9,10  conf=0.95
: sepsis_diagnosis  SIRS_plus_infection  from=15,14  conf=0.92
: septic_shock_likely  hypotension_lactate_elevation  from=9,12  conf=0.85
> order  IV_access_large_

input:
. contract  parties=A_and_B  signed=2024_03_15
. clause_7  "A must deliver goods by 2024_06_30"
. fact  A_delivered=2024_07_02  B_accepted_delivery=yes
. fact  B_claims_breach  A_claims_waiver
. law  acceptance_after_breach_may_constitute_waiver
question: 계약 위반 여부와 면제 성립 가능성을 WCY 추론으로.
wcy_reasoning:
~ task  contract_breach_analysis  domain=contract_law
. contract  parties=A_and_B  signed=2024_03_15
. clause_7  "A must deliver goods by 2024_06_30"
. fact  A_delivered=2024_07_02  B_accepted_delivery=yes
. fact  B_claims_breach  A_claims_waiver
. law  acceptance_after_breach_may_constitute_waiver

: delivery_deadline_missed  conf=1.0  from=2,3  witness=due_2024_06_30_delivered_2024_07_02
: prima_facie_breach_established  conf=0.95  from=6  witness=late_delivery_2_days
: B_accepted_goods_after_breach  conf=1.0  from=3,6  witness=delivered_late_but_accepted
: waiver_elements_present  conf=0.78  from=8,5  witness=acceptance_after_known_breach
: material_breach_vs_minor_delay  delay=2_days  conf=0.6  from=6  witness=short_delay
: ?waiver_intent_unclear  hint=conduct_vs_explicit_waiver  conf_range=0.4..0.8  from=4
: B_subsequent_breach_claim_weakened  conf=0.82  from=8,9  witness=accepted_then_claimed
: waiver_defense_viable  conf=0.75  from=9,11  witness=acceptance_conduct_inconsistent_with_breach_claim

> conclude  breach_occurred=yes  conf=0.95  from=7
> conclude  waiver_likely_established=yes  conf=0.75  from=12  
> recommend  examine_acceptance_circumstances  looking_for=explicit_reservation_of_rights  from=10

input:
. code_context  shared_counter  multi_threaded
. thread_A  "if counter < limit: counter += 1"
. thread_B  "if counter < limit: counter += 1"
. observed  counter_exceeds_limit_occasionally
. environment  python  no_GIL_guarantee_on_compound_ops
question: 버그 원인과 수정 방법을 WCY 추론으로.
wcy_reasoning:
~ task  debug_concurrency  domain=multi_threading
. code_context  shared_counter  multi_threaded
. thread_A  "if counter < limit: counter += 1"
. thread_B  "if counter < limit: counter += 1"
. observed  counter_exceeds_limit_occasionally
. environment  python  no_GIL_guarantee_on_compound_ops

: race_condition_hypothesis  conf=0.95  from=1,2,3,4
: compound_operation_check_increment  not_atomic  conf=1.0  from=2,3,5
: timing_scenario  both_threads_read_counter_simultaneously  conf=0.9  from=6,7
: example_race  counter=9_limit=10  both_read_9  both_see_9<10  both_increment  result=11  from=8
: root_cause  check_and_increment_not_atomic  conf=0.92  from=7,9

: solution_lock_mechanism  threading.Lock()  conf=0.85  from=10
: solution_atomic_operation  threading.local_or_queue  conf=0.75  from=10
: solution_compare_and_swap  threading.Condition  conf=0.65  from=10

> fix_primary  wrap_with_lock  "with lock: if counter < limit: counter += 1"  from=11
> fix_alternative  use_threading_queue  maxsize=limit  put_nowait_with_full_exception  from=12
> add_synchronization  acquire_lock_before_check_release_after_increment  from=11

! warning  performance_impact  lock_contention_possible  from=14
! note  GIL_insufficient  compound_operations_still_interruptible  from=5,7

input:
. setup  disease_prevalence=0.01  population=10000
. test_sensitivity=0.95  test_specificity=0.90
. patient_tested_positive
. question  "양성 판정 시 실제 질환 보유 확률은?"
. hint  Bayes_theorem_required
question: 베이즈 정리를 적용하여 양성예측도를 WCY 추론으로 계산하라.
wcy_reasoning:
~ task  bayesian_diagnosis  domain=medical_statistics
. setup  disease_prevalence=0.01  population=10000
. test_sensitivity=0.95  test_specificity=0.90
. patient_tested_positive
. question  "양성 판정 시 실제 질환 보유 확률은?"
. hint  Bayes_theorem_required
: diseased_population  10000*0.01=100  from=1  conf=1.0
: healthy_population  10000*0.99=9900  from=1  conf=1.0
: true_positives  100*0.95=95  from=6,2  conf=1.0
: false_positives  9900*(1-0.90)=9900*0.10=990  from=7,2  conf=1.0
: total_positives  95+990=1085  from=8,9  conf=1.0
: positive_predictive_value  P(disease|positive)=95/1085  from=8,10  conf=1.0
: calculate_ratio  95/1085≈0.0876  from=11  conf=1.0
: percentage_form  8.76%  from=12  conf=1.0
> conclude  PPV=0.0876  meaning=8.76%_chance_of_disease_given_positive_test  from=13  conf=1.0
! insight  low_PPV_despite_good_test_performance  due_to=low_prevalence  from=1,14

input:
. patient=Kwon  age=65  admitted_for=elective_surgery
. home_meds  metformin_1000mg_BID  lisinopril_10mg_QD  aspirin_81mg_QD
. metformin_hold_required  before_contrast  surgery_scheduled_tomorrow
. anesthesia_note  spinal_planned  no_general
. surgeon_note  expected_blood_loss=minimal
question: 수술 전 약물 조정 계획을 WCY 추론으로.
wcy_reasoning:
~ task  preop_medication_management  domain=perioperative_medicine

. patient=Kwon  age=65  admitted_for=elective_surgery
. home_meds  metformin_1000mg_BID  lisinopril_10mg_QD  aspirin_81mg_QD
. metformin_hold_required  before_contrast  surgery_scheduled_tomorrow
. anesthesia_note  spinal_planned  no_general
. surgeon_note  expected_blood_loss=minimal

: metformin_discontinue_timing  48h_before_contrast  conf=1.0  from=3
: metformin_restart_criteria  normal_renal_function_post_contrast  conf=1.0  from=3,6
: aspirin_bleeding_risk  minimal_expected_loss  spinal_anesthesia  conf=0.4  from=2,4,5
: aspirin_continue_vs_hold  ?decision  hint=bleeding_risk_vs_thrombotic_risk  conf_range=0.3..0.7
: lisinopril_hypotension_risk  spinal_block  elderly_patient  conf=0.75  from=2,4,1
: lisinopril_hold_recommended  morning_of_surgery  conf=0.85  from=10

> discontinue  metformin  timing=now  duration=48h_minimum  from=6
> hold  lisinopril  morning_of_surgery_only  from=11
> continue  aspirin  unless_contraindicated_by_surgeon  from=8,9
> order  BUN_creatinine  post_contrast  before_metformin_restart  from=7
> plan  restart_metformin  when=normal_renal_function_confirmed  from=7,14

! note  confirm_with_surgeon  aspirin_continuation  from=13
! note  monitor_BP  post_lisinopril_hold  elderly_patient  from=12,1

input:
. system  e-commerce  product_catalog  10M_SKUs
. traffic  read=50k_rps  write=100_rps  read_write_ratio=500
. current  DB_read_latency=200ms  target=20ms
. constraint  cache_budget=32GB_RAM  consistency=eventual_ok
question: 캐싱 전략을 설계하고 trade-off를 WCY 추론으로.
wcy_reasoning:
~ task  caching_strategy_design  domain=system_architecture
. system  e-commerce  product_catalog  10M_SKUs
. traffic  read=50k_rps  write=100_rps  read_write_ratio=500
. current  DB_read_latency=200ms  target=20ms
. constraint  cache_budget=32GB_RAM  consistency=eventual_ok

: read_heavy_workload  conf=0.98  from=2  witness=ratio_500_to_1
: latency_improvement_required  reduction=10x  from=3  conf=1.0
: cache_size_per_item  estimate=3KB_avg  from=1  conf=0.7
: max_cacheable_items  32GB/3KB=~10M  from=4,6  conf=0.8
: full_catalog_fits_in_cache  conf=0.85  from=1,7

: cache_hit_ratio_target  need=95%+  for_20ms_target  from=5  conf=0.9
: LRU_not_optimal  reason=product_popularity_skewed  conf=0.85  from=1
: LFU_better_for_ecommerce  reason=hot_products_pattern  conf=0.88  from=2,10

: write_through_overhead  100_rps_penalty  acceptable=yes  from=2,4  conf=0.9
: write_behind_option  eventual_consistency_ok  from=4  conf=0.95

: redis_cluster_needed  for_32GB  nodes=3-4  from=4  conf=0.92
: partition_strategy  by_product_id_hash  for_even_distribution  conf=0.85

> recommend  cache_architecture=redis_cluster  nodes=4  total_ram=32GB  from=15
> recommend  eviction_policy=LFU  reason=from=12  hot_product_optimization
> recommend  write_strategy=write_behind  reason=from=14  eventual_consistency_acceptable
> recommend
